layer_map.what: First organism tier in the renderer: the shell layout tree (titlebar, resizable sidebar, request/response split, statusbar) + hand-rolled clamped Divider; exposes named mount slots; owns the store→`<html>` data-attribute effect and the CSS-var write on its own root
Sibling per-component stylesheets; semantic class names bound to `tokens.css` custom properties; no inline styles; `prefers-reduced-motion` gating
Existing `Tabs` molecule mounted into the tab slot as a content-decoupling proof; otherwise untouched

Net-new `settingsStore` zustand store (single module-level instance, typed state+actions, a settingsStore-owned `reset()` action for tests — toastStore uses `clearAll()` + a local `resetStore()` helper, settingsStore provides `reset()` directly; no Node/electron imports) — SSOT for `{ theme, accent, mstyle, sidebarWidth, paneRatio, sidebarCollapsed }`; reuses existing `cx()` for class composition

Mount `<Shell>` as App.tsx's content while PRESERVING the existing `<ToastProvider>`/`<ToastViewport>` overlay substrate — Shell replaces only the dev-only PrimitivesDemo child, NOT the provider wrapper; `PrimitivesDemo` stays dev-gated (`import.meta.env.DEV`) but unmounted
Set BrowserWindow `minWidth` so the OS window cannot shrink below the static sidebar clamp floor (see Key Design Decisions: clamp strategy)
`<html>` already implements `[data-theme]` + `[data-mstyle]`; `data-accent` is set but inert (no `[data-accent]` block); no edits this task
Vitest+TL interaction (divider clamp, Cmd-B, in-session survival, slot rendering) + Playwright CT (real-browser divider drag, keyboard resize, focus/ARIA)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: New `components/organisms/` sublayer below molecules; imports from molecules + lib; lib never imports back
key_design_decisions.why: Extends the established atomic-design tiering (atoms→molecules→lib) consistently; first organism establishes the tier. Dependency direction preserved (presentation→lib). In-scope: AC-2. Establishing a new convention, not a departure (no organisms tier existed).
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Placing Shell flat in `components/` (breaks the atomic-design tiering 001 established); putting it in `lib/` (lib is leaf-level, must not import components)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Mirror `toastStore`'s *shape* — `create()`, single module-level instance, typed `SettingsState` (fields + actions), per-field selector usage — plus a settingsStore-owned `reset()` action for tests; flat state `{ theme, accent, mstyle, sidebarWidth, paneRatio, sidebarCollapsed }`; the ONLY source of truth for width/ratio; drag commits via actions, never direct mutation. NB: toastStore exposes `clearAll()`, NOT `reset()` — its tests wrap `getState().clearAll()` in a local `resetStore()` helper (src/renderer/src/lib/__tests__/toastStore.test.ts); settingsStore adds `reset()` as its OWN action rather than mirroring a symbol toastStore lacks
key_design_decisions.why: Constitution §5 (state mutated only via actions) + §7 constraint (mirror toastStore's shape); reuses the proven pattern rather than reinventing (§6.3). In-scope: AC-1, AC-6, §7.
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: A React-context/useState shell (violates "shared renderer state lives in zustand"); a panel library owning layout state (already decided against in spec Q-2 — would split SSOT)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: A single `useEffect` in `Shell` subscribed to the three store fields writes `document.documentElement.dataset.{theme,accent,mstyle}`; effect is the only writer; cleanup not required (attributes are overwritten, not stacked)
key_design_decisions.why: tokens.css keys off `<html>` attributes already; an effect is the idiomatic store→DOM-side-effect bridge and keeps the store pure (no DOM in actions). In-scope: AC-6, AC-10.
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Writing dataset inside store actions (puts DOM side-effects in zustand, untestable in jsdom-free unit); inline `style`/class theming (violates AC-14 + the token contract)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: During drag: `pointermove` → rAF-batched write of a CSS custom property (`--sidebar-width` / `--pane-ratio`) on the Shell root, NO `setState` per move; on `pointerup` (incl. release outside window via `pointercapture`/window listener): commit the final clamped value to the store via an action
key_design_decisions.why: NFR ≤16ms (§7) — avoids per-pointermove re-render storms; store stays SSOT but is written once per gesture. In-scope: AC-4, AC-16, §7 NFR, §9 risk-3.
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: setState-per-pointermove (re-render storm, fails the 16ms NFR); committing to store mid-drag (same storm via store subscribers)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Pure clamp helpers (sidebar 200-520px, ratio 0.15-0.85) applied in JS at BOTH the drag-commit boundary AND on a `window` `resize` listener that re-derives and re-commits clamped values when the OS window shrinks. ADDITIONALLY set the Electron BrowserWindow `minWidth` (src/main/index.ts, ≈720px = sidebar max 520 + a minimum pane area) so the window cannot shrink below the static sidebar floor — a constant 200px floor cannot otherwise guarantee no-overflow against an unbounded-shrink window (src/main/index.ts sets `width: 900` with NO `minWidth` today, so the window can be dragged narrower than 200px and a 200px floor then forces the sidebar wider than the whole window)
key_design_decisions.why: §7 constraint + AC-17 (no negative/overflowing pane on shrink); clamping in JS (not CSS `min()`) keeps the store value valid as SSOT, and the window `minWidth` bound makes the §7 literal 200-520px clamp + AC-17 no-overflow jointly satisfiable. In-scope: AC-4, AC-16, AC-17.
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: CSS-only clamping (store would hold an out-of-range value, breaking SSOT); clamping only on drag (window-shrink edge unhandled — AC-17 fails); a static floor with NO window `minWidth` (overflows when the window is dragged narrower than 200px)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: `sidebarCollapsed: boolean` toggled by a Cmd-B key handler; while collapsed the sidebar AND its divider are UNMOUNTED (conditional render, not `width:0` / `display:none`) so the focusable `role=separator` divider leaves the a11y tree cleanly — Arrow-key resize cannot mutate `sidebarWidth` on a hidden sidebar, and there is no dangling-focus state on an invisible splitter. On collapse, focus returns to the sidebar-toggle control; on reopen the divider re-mounts at the preserved `sidebarWidth` (which is NOT zeroed)
key_design_decisions.why: AC-5 (preserve last width for restore) + AC-9 (the divider a11y contract holds only while mounted). A boolean is the minimal state — no width-stashing field needed since `sidebarWidth` is left intact. Unmounting (vs `width:0`) resolves the collapse×divider interaction AC-5 and AC-9 each leave undefined individually. In-scope: AC-5, AC-9. States: `collapsed=false` (sidebar+divider mounted) / `true` (both unmounted, focus on toggle) both exercised by AC-5.
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: A separate `lastSidebarWidth` stash field (redundant — `sidebarWidth` already holds it); `width:0` collapse (leaves the divider focusable+keyboard-resizable on a 0-width hidden sidebar — Arrow keys mutate `sidebarWidth` while collapsed); `display:none` without refocus (focus lost mid-interaction with no defined target)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: `role="separator"` + `aria-orientation` + `aria-valuenow`/`aria-valuemin`/`aria-valuemax` + `tabindex=0`; Arrow keys step the value (committing clamped to store), Home/End jump to bounds; hand-rolled (zero-dep)
key_design_decisions.why: §7 constraint + AC-9; consistent with the existing hand-rolled-WAI-ARIA precedent (Tabs molecule hand-rolls its APG pattern rather than buying it). Not a departure — it follows the documented "hand-roll when the pattern is small and panel-decoupled" rule of thumb. In-scope: AC-9, §9 risk-1.
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Buying react-resizable-panels for a11y (spec Q-2 decided against — splits SSOT); `role="slider"` (separator is the correct splitter role per APG window-splitter)

key_design_decisions.chosen_approach: Each of sidebar/tabs/panes/modals is a typed, optional `ReactNode` prop (or small named-children object) on `Shell`; Shell renders `{slot}` into its mount point and never inspects contents; slot prop types documented
key_design_decisions.why: AC-7 (render children without depending on contents) + §9 risk-5 (no shell knowledge of slot contents); `ReactNode` is the minimal decoupled contract. In-scope: AC-7, AC-11. States: optional/absent slot renders nothing, present slot renders children — both exercised by AC-7.
key_design_decisions.alternatives_rejected: Render-prop/function-children slots (lets Shell pass data → leaks coupling); a slot registry/context indirection (over-engineered for static mount points)

file_impact.what_changes: Root shell organism: titlebar + sidebar + pane-split + statusbar layout; named slots; store→`<html>` data-attribute effect; window-resize re-clamp listener
Titlebar: logo, workspace pill, sidebar toggle, command-palette trigger (button/slot), environment selector, account pill (presentational)

Resizable left sidebar shell; consumes `--sidebar-width`; collapse honored via `sidebarCollapsed` (sidebar + its divider UNMOUNTED when collapsed; focus returns to the sidebar-toggle); sidebar mount slot
Request/response split container; consumes `--pane-ratio`; pane mount slots

Hand-rolled pointer-event divider; rAF CSS-var write during drag; commit clamped value to store on release; `role=separator` + aria-valuenow + keyboard resize; unmounted while `sidebarCollapsed` (no hidden-splitter focus/resize state)
Shell grid/layout; semantic classes bound to tokens.css; `prefers-reduced-motion` gating
Sidebar styles incl. collapsed state; `--sidebar-width` consumption

zustand store mirroring toastStore's create()/single-instance/selector shape; typed `SettingsState` + actions + a settingsStore-owned `reset()` test action (toastStore exposes `clearAll()`, not `reset()`); SSOT for theme/accent/mstyle/sidebarWidth/paneRatio/sidebarCollapsed; concrete hardcoded defaults `{ theme: 'light', accent: 'mint', mstyle: 'soft', sidebarWidth: 260, paneRatio: 0.5, sidebarCollapsed: false }` (tokens.css `:root` is the attribute-less light/`soft` baseline — `mstyle: 'soft'` matches the tokens.css "default should match soft" note; `theme: 'light'` falls through to `:root`)

Mount `<Shell>` INSIDE the existing `<ToastProvider>`, keeping the mandatory `<ToastViewport />` (every `toast()` portals into it — do NOT delete the provider substrate); replace ONLY the dev-only PrimitivesDemo child with `<Shell>`; PrimitivesDemo stays dev-gated but unmounted

Set BrowserWindow `minWidth` (≈720px = sidebar max 520 + a minimum pane area) so the window cannot shrink below the static sidebar clamp floor — makes AC-17 no-overflow satisfiable alongside the §7 literal 200-520px clamp. (Addition discovered during planning — NOT in spec §4 Affected Areas; a main-process window-config change, which is the main process's responsibility per constitution §2.1; the feature is otherwise renderer-only.)

Vitest+TL: divider clamp, Cmd-B collapse/restore (incl. divider unmounted + focus→toggle while collapsed), in-session setting survival, slot rendering, window-resize re-clamp, and a regression test that a `toast()` still renders with `<Shell>` mounted (ToastProvider substrate preserved)
Playwright CT: real-browser divider drag, keyboard resize, focus/ARIA separator fidelity

doc_impact.what_changes: Record the net-new `organisms/` tier + dependency direction (organisms→molecules/lib)
Note the renderer gains an organisms tier + the `settingsStore` SSOT pattern (mirrors toastStore) and the store→`<html>` data-attribute bridge

risks.risk: Dependency-direction: a new organism imports `lib` in the wrong direction, or `lib/settingsStore` imports a component
risks.mitigation: Keep `settingsStore` leaf-level (imports only `zustand`); organisms import lib, never the reverse. NB: the current ESLint config (`@electron-toolkit/eslint-config-ts` + react/prettier) has NO import-boundary rule, so `npm run lint` does NOT catch this — the real guard is leaf-level discipline + code review + a CBM dependency query; optionally add an ESLint `no-restricted-imports` rule barring `components/**` from `lib/**` to mechanize it

risks.risk: Package-boundary: `settingsStore` or an organism reaches for a Node/electron import (e.g. for future persistence)
risks.mitigation: AC-15 grep gate; persistence stays §6-deferred behind a future main-process IPC port, not the renderer store

risks.risk: a11y: hand-rolled `role="separator"` splitter mis-implements valuenow/keyboard, or jsdom hides real focus/drag defects
risks.mitigation: Derisk spike on Divider before locking (per §9); Playwright CT in a real browser for keyboard resize + focus; axe pass

risks.risk: perf: divider drag without rAF/CSS-var batching causes per-pointermove re-render storms (>16ms frames)
risks.mitigation: rAF-batched CSS-var write during drag; commit to store only on `pointerup`; measure vs a setState-per-move baseline

risks.risk: perf/correctness: window-resize re-clamp math yields negative/overflowing panes when sidebar(200-520) + ratio(0.15-0.85) bounds interact on shrink
risks.mitigation: Set BrowserWindow `minWidth` (src/main/index.ts) so the window cannot shrink below the static sidebar floor (a constant 200px floor cannot otherwise guarantee no-overflow against an unbounded-shrink window); prototype clamp math against the window-shrink edge; cover with an AC-17 behavior test

risks.risk: Integration: replacing the App.tsx root could drop the `<ToastProvider>`/`<ToastViewport>` substrate, silently breaking every `toast()` (Radix provider has no throwing guard — failure is a silent no-op, not a compile error)
risks.mitigation: Mount `<Shell>` INSIDE the existing ToastProvider; keep `<ToastViewport />`; add a regression test asserting a `toast()` still renders with the Shell mounted

risks.risk: accent persisted but visually inert (no `[data-accent]` CSS) reads as wired-but-broken to a reviewer
risks.mitigation: AC-10 asserts no visual change this task; document inert behavior; accent palette CSS is an explicit later task

risks.risk: named slot API leaks shell knowledge of slot contents, defeating decoupling
risks.mitigation: Typed `ReactNode` slots only; mount the existing Tabs molecule into the tab slot as a content-decoupling proof (§9 risk-5)

specialist_consultation.sub_question: Layer map, key design decisions, dependency/boundary risks, constitution flags, minimal design, §6-respect
specialist_consultation.input_summary: New organisms tier; settingsStore mirrors toastStore as SSOT; store→`<html>` data-attr effect; rAF+CSS-var drag committing to store on release; JS clamp + window-resize re-clamp; Cmd-B collapse boolean preserving width; hand-rolled WAI-ARIA splitter; typed ReactNode slots

dependencies: No external dependencies. `zustand` (settingsStore), `radix-ui` (existing molecules), Vitest + @testing-library/react + Playwright CT are all already in the project. No packages to install, no services to configure, no environment variables.
